title: Subscribe to our newsletter
description: Get the best accommodation deals and news delivered to your inbox.
error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
authMessage: Sign in to subscribe to the newsletter

authPopover.title: Sign in to subscribe
authPopover.message: Create a free account and receive news from the Litoral region in your inbox.

verify.successTitle: Welcome! Your subscription has been confirmed.
verify.successDescription: From now on you will receive news from Hospeda in your inbox.

errorPage.tokenExpiredDescription: The confirmation link has expired. You can request a new one.
errorPage.resendSuccess: We resent the confirmation email. Check your inbox.
errorPage.invalidTokenDescription: The confirmation link is not valid.

unsubscribePage.title: Your subscription has been cancelled.
unsubscribePage.description: You will no longer receive emails from Hospeda.
unsubscribePage.resubscribeLink: If this was a mistake, resubscribe

whatsapp.title: Join the Hospeda WhatsApp channel
whatsapp.description: Receive exclusive deals and Litoral news on your WhatsApp.
